fields.name: serviceId
fields.label: Service ID
fields.description: Unique identifier used for hover states and routing (e.g. 'research', 'strategy')

fields.name: order
fields.label: Display Order
fields.description: Controls the position on the arc (0 = bottom-left, 3 = bottom-right)

fields.name: slug
fields.label: Slug
fields.description: URL-friendly version of the name (lowercase, hyphens only)

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.description: Brief summary for SEO and social sharing (max 160 characters)

fields.name: featuredImage
fields.label: Featured Image
fields.description: Main image displayed in post listings and social sharing

fields.name: featured
fields.label: Featured Post
fields.description: Display this post in featured sections

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
